## 答案:**70 個 `.c` 檔案**直接 `#include "server.h"`

使用 `ccodegraph.py who-includes server.h --json` 查詢,回傳 76 個檔案(含 5 個 `.h` 檔:`cluster_slot_stats.h`, `functions.h`, `geo.h`, `rdb.h`, `script_lua.h`,需排除),過濾後剩 70 個 `.c` 檔;另外用 `grep -rl '#include[[:space:]]*"server\.h"' src --include='*.c'` 覆核,兩者結果**完全一致**(diff 無差異)。

完整清單(70 個,`src/` 底下):

```
acl.c            aof.c            bio.c            bitops.c
blocked.c        call_reply.c     childinfo.c      cluster.c
cluster_asm.c    cluster_legacy.c commands.c        config.c
connection.c     crc16.c          db.c             debug.c
defrag.c         entry.c          estore.c          eval.c
evict.c          expire.c         fwtree.c          gcra.c
hotkeys.c        hyperloglog.c    iothread.c        keymeta.c
latency.c        lazyfree.c       logreqres.c       lolwut.c
lolwut5.c        lolwut6.c        lolwut8.c         memory_prefetch.c
module.c         multi.c          networking.c      notify.c
object.c         pubsub.c         rdb.c             redis-check-aof.c
redis-check-rdb.c replication.c   resp_parser.c     rio.c
script.c         script_lua.c     sentinel.c        server.c
slowlog.c        socket.c         sort.c            sparkline.c
sparsearray.c    syncio.c         t_array.c         t_hash.c
t_list.c         t_set.c          t_stream.c        t_string.c
t_zset.c         threads_mngr.c   timeout.c         tls.c
tracking.c       unix.c
```
